title: Create Renewablity
description: Adds ways to renewably craft certain create resources
body:
This allows you to renewably craft certain ores and other resources in the Create mod



Features

Adds balanced renewable recipes for chrimsite, veridium, ochrum, limestone, asurine, zinc, lapis, coal, redstone, iron, diamonds, netherite scrap, amethyst, calcite, pumpkin seeds, beetroot seeds, melon seeds, and sugar cane

Usage

If you would like to use this in a modpack go ahead
You are not permitted to upload this anywhere other than in a modpack
Please give any suggestions or questions in the comments

If you want me to add support for an addon just ask I'll probably add it

Enjoy!
